Declares a function to check if the Bluetooth driver supports classic Bluetooth.

# Purpose
This C header file declares a function [`bt_driver_supports_bt_classic`](<#bt_driver_supports_bt_classic>). The function returns a `bool` value indicating whether the Bluetooth driver supports Bluetooth Classic functionality. The inclusion of `<stdbool.h>` ensures that the `bool` type is available for use in the function declaration. The `#pragma once` directive is used to prevent multiple inclusions of this header file in a single compilation unit.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdbool.h`
